title: eugenia biflora
intro: Eugenia biflora, also known as the two-flowered Eugenia or golden guava, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. The Eugenia biflora plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Eugenia biflora include its potential to help reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Eugenia biflora can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
